meaning: adj.Glasgow 的n.Glasgow 市民(Glasgow,即"格拉斯哥"是苏格兰最大的都市和主要港口)
examples: My good friend Dave, formerly the Glaswegian Miserablist, tries to help out.
She has a strong Glaswegian accent.
She has a strong Glaswegian accent .
